overall.description: First-person exploration through a cyberpunk city district, transitioning from covered traditional market walkways to open streets and finally along a waterfront promenade with towering neon-lit skyscrapers. The footage showcases a blend of traditional Japanese architectural elements with futuristic neon-drenched urban environments typical of Cyberpunk 2077.

scene_state.functional_zone: traditional covered market arcade with Japanese architectural elements

events.description: exits covered market walkway into open street intersection

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through covered market area toward the street exit, passing red paper lanterns and food stalls

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in blue shirt walking toward camera in the covered area

entered.detail: traditional Japanese tiled roof structure covering the market walkway
red Japanese paper lantern hanging from the roof structure
food stall front with signage visible in the covered market

segments.scene_description: Walking through a covered traditional market area with Japanese architectural elements and red paper lanterns. The scene transitions to an open street intersection around the 4-second mark as the camera exits the covered walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with hotel and industrial ventilation structures

events.description: crossing the asphalt road at the intersection
approaching and entering another covered walkway structure

agents.ego_description: crossing the open street while observing the hotel sign and industrial structures, then turning toward the next covered section

entered.detail: multi-story building with purple neon 'OTEL' signage
large circular industrial fan or ventilation structure on building facade
metal guardrails separating pedestrian walkway from the road

segments.scene_description: Crossing an open urban street intersection with a prominent hotel building featuring neon signage and large industrial ventilation fans visible. The camera then approaches a covered walkway entrance, transitioning from open sky to sheltered space.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered commercial walkway with vending machines and neon storefronts

agents.ego_description: walking along the covered pedestrian walkway, passing vending machines and shop fronts with neon signage

notable_agents.action: person sitting on concrete bench using a device

entered.detail: overhead concrete and metal structure covering the pedestrian walkway
illuminated beverage vending machine with colorful display
bright neon signage for various shops along the walkway

segments.scene_description: Walking along a covered commercial walkway lined with illuminated vending machines, neon shop signs, and metal guardrails. The space is sheltered from direct sunlight with artificial lighting from storefronts, and a few pedestrians are visible sitting or walking.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront promenade with elevated highway and distant megastructures

events.description: exiting covered walkway and emerging into open waterfront area with canal view

agents.ego_description: walking along the waterfront promenade with the canal on the left and futuristic skyscrapers visible across the water

notable_agents.action: futuristic black car driving along the waterfront road

entered.detail: wide water canal running parallel to the pedestrian walkway
metal safety railing separating walkway from the water
massive elevated highway or monorail structure spanning across the view
towering futuristic buildings with glass facades visible across the water

segments.scene_description: Transitioning to an open waterfront promenade with a canal on the left and towering futuristic skyscrapers visible in the distance. The camera walks under massive elevated highway structures while a futuristic car drives along the adjacent road.

scene_state.functional_zone: curved waterfront walkway with heavy commercial billboard signage

events.description: multiple futuristic vehicles passing by on the adjacent road

agents.ego_description: continuing along the curved waterfront path, passing other pedestrians and observing the traffic and large digital billboards

notable_agents.action: silver sedan driving past on the waterfront road
pedestrian with backpack walking ahead on the promenade

entered.detail: curved concrete promenade following the bend of the waterfront
ground level shops with neon signage along the walkway

segments.scene_description: Continuing along the curved waterfront promenade with the water now closer on the left. Multiple futuristic vehicles pass on the adjacent road while large digital billboards and commercial storefronts line the right side. The elevated highway structure curves away to the right as the path continues under bright sunlight.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey that transitions from the intimate, sheltered corridors of a traditional market into a sprawling, neon-lit futuristic waterfront. It begins under the eaves of a covered walkway adorned with red paper lanterns before emerging into the bright light of an open urban intersection dominated by a hotel with neon signage and industrial ventilation fans. The camera then ducks back into a sheltered commercial passage lined with glowing vending machines and neon shop signs, moving past pedestrians and metal guardrails. As the path opens up again, the scene shifts to a waterfront promenade where the camera passes under massive elevated highway structures while futuristic cars glide by. Finally, the view expands along a curved canal bordered by towering skyscrapers and large digital billboards, moving under a clear sky as the highway curves away into the distance.
